engine.goal: Audit the send-money onboarding prompt/state flow and implement the exact EVM conversational ordering: choose auth path, confirm wallet sign-in on unigox.com, verify the login wallet key, then ask for the separate exported signing key.

audit_current_flow.audit_summary: Current transfer-orchestrator still jumps from EVM auth-path selection straight to requesting the wallet private key, without the intermediate “sign in on unigox.com first” confirmation state the user asked for.

capture_required_sequence.sequence_requirements: Required EVM order: ask auth path -> if EVM, ask whether the user has already signed in on unigox.com with that wallet / instruct them to do so first -> after confirmation, ask which login wallet key they used -> verify login with that login key -> only then ask for the separate UNIGOX-exported signing key.

design_state_changes.implementation_plan: Add explicit EVM onboarding stages for sign-in confirmation and login-key verification, route missing-auth EVM selections through those stages, and only transition to the existing signing-key gate after login verification succeeds.

define_regression_coverage.test_plan: Add tests that assert the exact prompt ordering, the lack of an immediate key request after choosing EVM, login verification failure retry behavior, and the post-verification transition to the exported signing-key prompt.
